case_title: WILMER JERONIMO CASTANON VS. EMIN, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTANON, WILMER JERONIMO AS TO DEFENDANT EMIN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA VALENCIA AND KEBAB JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
